# aigateway_provider (Resource)

An upstream AI provider (openai, azure_openai, anthropic, gemini, ...) configured on the gateway.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aigateway_provider" "azure" {
  type        = "azure_openai"
  name        = "Azure OpenAI 🇪🇺"
  endpoint    = "https://my-aoai.openai.azure.com"
  auth_type   = "apiKey"
  credential  = var.azure_openai_api_key
  api_version = "2024-10-21"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint` (String) Upstream API base URL.
- `name` (String) Human-readable provider name.
- `type` (String) Provider type: openai | azure_openai | anthropic | gemini | mistral | stackit | aws_bedrock | custom_openai | ollama.

### Optional

- `api_version` (String) API version (Azure OpenAI).
- `auth_type` (String) Authentication type (apiKey | managedIdentity | none). Defaults to apiKey.
- `credential` (String, Sensitive) Raw upstream API key / secret. Stored in the gateway credential store; never read back.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the provider is enabled. Defaults to true.
- `project_id` (String) GCP project id (Vertex AI).
- `region` (String) Region (Vertex AI, AWS Bedrock).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server-assigned provider id (provider_<uuid>).
